name: Bridal Sweet Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. This punch can be made in advance and served cold.
2. Bring the water to a boil, then add the tea bags and steep for 5 minutes.
3. Remove the tea bags and stir in the sugar until dissolved.
4. Allow the mixture to cool, then chill in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours.
5. Pour the chilled punch into a large punch bowl.
6. Add the orange juice, pineapple juice, and lemon juice, stirring well.
7. Just before serving, add the ginger ale and stir gently.
8. Serve with ice cubes and garnish with mint leaves.
